name: Kendra Scott
why: Dominant DTC jewelry brand with strong charm/personalization angle via Color Bar. Competes on personalization, gifting occasions, and community-driven retail. Their branded Yellow Friday event and micro-influencer strategy set the benchmark.

ad_types.type: Single Static Image — Product-Forward Feed Ad
ad_types.description: Clean product photography centered on a single hero piece or collection flatlay on light neutral or brand-yellow background. Polished, evenly lit studio lighting. Minimal text overlay. CTA is direct 'Shop Now'.
ad_types.why_it_works: Clean format lets the jewelry do the talking. High-contrast product isolation emphasizes gem color and metallic shine, the primary purchase driver for fashion jewelry buyers.

ad_types.type: Promotional Discount Ad — Birthday / Loyalty Trigger
ad_types.description: Single image with branded overlay badge. Copy leads with emotional hook ('Happy (Almost) Birthday!') followed by tiered offer (50% off fashion, 25% off fine/demi-fine). CTA drives to sign-up flow.
ad_types.why_it_works: Personalized trigger events dramatically increase CTR. Tiered discount protects margin while creating perceived generosity. Sign-up CTA builds email/SMS list simultaneously.

ad_types.type: Yellow Friday Sale Burst Ad — Branded Seasonal Event
ad_types.description: Brand's proprietary Black Friday alternative using signature yellow. Bold typography with discount callouts against bright yellow or black background. TV/video versions use warm family-gathering scenes. No promo code needed.
ad_types.why_it_works: Owning a named event builds brand equity beyond any single sale. Yellow creates instant brand recognition. No-code checkout removes friction. Cross-channel consistency amplifies reach.

ad_types.description: Nano/micro-influencers (10K-50K) film at or near retail locations or in natural settings. Native vertical Reels showing handling, stacking, wearing charm bracelets. Repurposed as paid dark posts on Meta and TikTok.
ad_types.why_it_works: Platform-native UGC blends into organic feeds. Third-party voices provide social proof. Achieved +20% CTR lift vs UGC-only, +175% ROAS lift YoY, +118% CVR lift YoY.

ad_types.description: Co-branded ads tied to cultural IP partnerships (Disney, Barbie). Visual language blends Kendra Scott aesthetic with IP partner's color world. Limited-edition framing creates urgency without explicit discount.
ad_types.why_it_works: Reaches IP partner's audience. Barbie campaign achieved +36% CTR lift. Cultural moment alignment drives earned media alongside paid reach.

ad_types.type: Gifting Campaign Video — Male-Targeted CTV and Social
ad_types.description: 30-second narrative spot using humor (Omaha Productions). Opens with situational misunderstanding, pivots to Kendra Scott solution. Warm domestic holiday setting. Runs on ESPN CTV, YouTube pre-roll, Meta video.
ad_types.why_it_works: Targets male shoppers (20% of customer base). Humor creates shareability. CTV on ESPN reaches sports-watching males at peak gift-research season.

visual_style: Two visual registers: (1) clean, aspirational, feminine — high-key studio lighting, white or light marble surfaces, soft warm tones with gold and crystal accents; (2) warm, intimate lifestyle for UGC/influencer and holiday campaigns — natural light, candid framing. Yellow is signature brand color. Typography is clean serif or modern sans-serif, kept large and legible.
hooks: Birthday / personal milestone trigger — 'Happy (Almost) Birthday!' with tiered discount
Branded event urgency — 'Wake up, it's Yellow Friday! 40% off is HERE!'
Cultural moment / discovery hook — 'Haven't you heard? Charm...' curiosity-gap Reel opener
Gifting problem / humor setup — man presents jewelry box containing certificate for a named star
New arrival / freshness push — 'Discover Your New Style' benefit-oriented freshness hooks

content_cadence.frequency: Daily Instagram posts, 4-5x/week Reels, heavy cross-channel during Yellow Friday and holiday
content_cadence.platforms: Instagram (primary), TikTok, Facebook, ESPN CTV, YouTube
content_cadence.seasonal_peaks: Yellow Friday (late Nov), Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, holiday Q4

ugc_creator_strategy.approach: Nano and micro-influencers (10K-50K) create native vertical content, often filmed at retail locations
ugc_creator_strategy.content_types: Styling try-ons, charm stacking, unboxing, Color Bar visits
ugc_creator_strategy.documented_results: +175% ROAS lift YoY, +118% CVR lift YoY from influencer-led paid creative
ugc_creator_strategy.scale: Heavy investment in TikTok Spark Ads and Meta dark posts

creative_testing_patterns.method: A/B testing influencer content vs brand-produced. Platform-specific art direction across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok.
creative_testing_patterns.documented_results: +20% CTR lift for influencer TikTok vs standard UGC, +289% CTR lift on Valentine's Day activations

spend_signals.channels: TV (ESPN CTV), Meta, Instagram, TikTok, Email/SMS
spend_signals.investment_areas: Yellow Friday cross-channel, influencer Spark Ads, CTV for male gifting
spend_signals.notable: Peyton Manning's Omaha Productions partnership for holiday campaign
